## Required Checks

- [ ] Relevant docs/examples were updated, or this change has no user-visible or operational effect.
- [ ] Focused tests or CI checks cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] PHP lint was run for changed PHP files, or no PHP changed.
- [ ] Shell syntax checks were run for changed shell scripts, or no shell changed.
- [ ] `pytest -q core/tests` passed, or core behavior/contracts were not touched.
- [ ] Smoke/e2e passed, or the reason they were not run is documented below.
